inputs.label: Annual Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total hours the facility operates per year. Based on standard industrial engineering practice (Maynard's Industrial Engineering Handbook).

inputs.label: Total Downtime Minutes
inputs.businessContext: Total minutes of unplanned downtime in the period. Key metric in OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) and Lean manufacturing.

inputs.label: Hourly Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Total cost per hour of operation including labor, overhead, and opportunity cost. Based on activity-based costing principles.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output for uncertainty. Common in risk analysis (ISO 31000).

rules: dataConfidence must be one of: low, medium, high

thresholds.downtimeRatio: totalDowntimeMinutes / (annualOperatingHours * 60) > 0.1 => 'Critical: Downtime exceeds 10% of operating time'
thresholds.costPerMinute: hourlyCostRate / 60 > 10 => 'High cost per minute; consider reducing hourly cost rate'

suggestedActions: Implement preventive maintenance to reduce downtime
Analyze root causes of top downtime events using Pareto analysis
Consider SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) to reduce changeover time
